MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Michael V. Mahoney, Esq. Court notes for the record that default was entered against John T. Tax on December 24, 2002.The Court hears evidence and good cause appearing, grants judgment as follows: Principal: $39,405.97, Prejudgment Interest: $6,646.24, Fees: $1,872.18, Costs: $271.50 for a total judgment of $48,195.89.
